gaps: The provisioned snapshot exposed only a cluster URL, not the cluster metadata or petition-stage order text.
An event-specific prior command for SCOTUS petition-disposition labels and docket-number shapes would reduce ad hoc aggregate checks.
helpful: fedcourts paths resolved the event and snapshot location.
fedcourts stats provided aggregate SCOTUS petition base-rate context.
fedcourts query showed that historical SCOTUS cluster references do not cleanly imply grants.
notes: I used only the provisioned snapshot for case facts and used local corpus stats/query for calibration. The sparse historical snapshot made the non-grant disposition subtype uncertain.
